heading: Today
text: Scattered to numerous showers north, more isolated south with periods of sun. Chance of embedded thunderstorms in the afternoon. Highs in the 60s to near 70 north, in the 70s for the Champlain Valley and south. Northwest wind at 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds. A good chance of evening showers north with the chance of isolated storms, scattered showers south, then diminishing overnight. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s. Northwest wind becoming light and variable.

heading: Sunday, Father’s Day
text: A good chance of passing showers, with a chance of scattered thunderstorms. Highs from the upper 60s to low 70s north, in the low to mid 70s elsewhere. Light northwest wind.
